title: Frontend Developer
subtitle: I build scalable and high-performance web applications using React and TypeScript, focusing on clean code and modern, user-friendly interfaces.
subDescription: My focus is on building well-structured and maintainable frontend architectures with reusable components and thoughtful state management. I place strong emphasis on performance, scalability, and intuitive user experience.
location: Germany · Available for on-site & remote · German, English
aboutTitle: My journey as a developer: From simple HTML pages to scalable React applications and my own SaaS projects
aboutContent: Frontend Developer specialized in React and TypeScript. Experienced in building modern web applications with a focus on scalable architecture, performance, and user-friendly interfaces. Clean code, clear structure, and continuous learning are at the core of my work.
skillsSubtitle: Technologies I work with – from idea to production-ready applications.
skillsContent: My focus is on developing scalable frontend applications with thoughtful architecture, clean structure, and a strong attention to UI/UX.
technologiesSubtitle: Core stack for modern web applications – from single-page apps to fully integrated platforms.
uiSubtitle: Modern design systems and UI frameworks for building consistent, aesthetic, and responsive user interfaces.
apiSubtitle: Structured content, clean interfaces, and reliable integrations into existing systems.
toolsSubtitle: Build tools, version control, and modern development environments for efficient and productive workflows.
projectsSubtitle: A selection of projects that demonstrate my skills and experience in frontend development, showcasing my ability to build scalable and user-friendly web applications.
projectsDescription: The focus is on well-structured frontend architectures, reusable components, and thoughtful user experience. Each project reflects my approach to clean code, performance, and modern UI/UX standards.

resources.title: Flowdex
resources.description: SaaS platform for managing and optimizing collaborative workflows.
resources.fulldescription: Flowdex is a self-developed, SaaS-like platform designed to manage collaborative workflows. The application allows users to organize complex processes, coordinate tasks efficiently, and track progress in real time. With a clear and structured interface and a scalable architecture, it ensures a stable and high-performance user experience. The focus was on reusable components, well-structured state management, and an intuitive design to support efficient teamwork.

resources.title: CargoSync
resources.description: SaaS-like logistics platform for real-time delivery management.
resources.fulldescription: CargoSync is a self-developed, SaaS-like logistics platform designed for efficient management and real-time tracking of delivery processes. The application provides a clear and structured user interface that allows users to monitor shipment statuses in an intuitive way. By implementing a scalable architecture and optimized data handling, a stable and responsive user experience is ensured. The focus was on modular components, efficient data flows, and an intuitive design to simplify complex logistics operations.

resources.title: This Portfolio
resources.description: Modern multilingual portfolio website showcasing projects and technical skills.
resources.fulldescription: This portfolio was developed as a modern, multilingual web application to clearly present my projects, skills, and development approach. It combines interactive components, subtle animations, and a clean layout to create a smooth user experience. The focus is on clean code, scalable architecture, and intuitive design to present complex content in a simple and structured way.

resources.title: Weather App
resources.description: Modern weather app for displaying real-time weather data worldwide.
resources.fulldescription: This weather app was developed as a modern, user-friendly application to display real-time weather data for cities around the world. Built with a mobile-first approach, it is optimized for various screen sizes and devices. Users can search for locations, save them to a favorites list, and manage their personalized list easily. The focus was on a clean interface, fast data display, and an intuitive user experience.

resources.title: Joke App
resources.description: Humorous joke app with modern design and API integration.
resources.fulldescription: This joke app was developed with a focus on modern design and a smooth user experience. The application is fully responsive and adapts seamlessly to different devices and screen sizes. It features both light and dark modes and allows users to fetch random jokes from an external API. The goal was to create a simple, entertaining, and easily accessible app that delivers a quick moment of humor anytime.

contactDescription: Seeking a frontend developer position where I can apply and further develop my skills in building modern web applications.

info.description: For job inquiries or open positions, feel free to reach out directly.

social.description: Profiles for more context on projects, tech stack and track record.

footerdescription: Frontend Developer focused on building scalable web applications, modern UI/UX, and clean, maintainable code.
